Description.description: Innovation backlog / idea board for the My Work Code App. Captures feature requests, product suggestions, or improvement proposals categorized by Power Platform product area (Copilot Studio, Canvas Apps, Model-Driven Apps, Power Automate, Power Pages, Azure, AI, General, Other). Ideas can optionally link to a customer account, a contact (the submitter), and/or a project. Use when a user asks about 'ideas', 'suggestions', 'feature requests', 'innovations', 'proposals', or 'the idea backlog'. Supports priority ranking and dashboard pinning.
Unique identifier of the user who created the record.
Date and time when the record was created.
Unique identifier of the delegate user who created the record.
Sequence number of the import that created this record.
Unique identifier of the user who modified the record.
Date and time when the record was modified.
Unique identifier of the delegate user who modified the record.
Date and time that the record was migrated.
Owner Id
Unique identifier for the business unit that owns the record
Unique identifier for the team that owns the record.
Unique identifier for the user that owns the record.
Status of the Idea
Status of the Idea
Reason for the status of the Idea
Reason for the status of the Idea
Optional lookup to the customer account the idea originated from or applies to.

Power Platform product area the idea applies to. Values: 468510000 = Copilot Studio, 468510001 = Canvas Apps, 468510002 = Model-Driven Apps, 468510003 = Power Automate, 468510004 = Power Pages, 468510005 = Azure, 468510006 = AI General, 468510007 = App General, 468510008 = Other.
Optional lookup to the contact (person) who submitted or championed the idea.
Full proposal / pitch for the idea — the 'why' and the 'what'. Multi-line text.
Unique identifier for entity instances
Short title of the idea (e.g., 'Add AI extraction to meeting summaries'). Required, free text.
True when the user has pinned this idea to the dashboard so it stays visible.
Priority of the idea. Values: 468510002 = Top Priority, 468510003 = High, 468510001 = Medium, 468510000 = Low.
Optional lookup to a tdvsp_project this idea is associated with.
For internal use only.
Time zone code that was in use when the record was created.
